title: Form Conditions Editability

posts.author: robert.pullen (Dusty)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to create conditional formatting on a form based off previous selection on an existing board however it appears that conditions can only be used for new columns. Looking for some flexibility when creating forms to have customizable options that pull in the columns based off of previous selections.
